config.script:
'enum2str #include "50100"
'harui #include "50101"
'getcurrent #include "50203"
'getCurrentRKS #include "50120"
function fopen()
'w trybie wyboru nie otwieraj od razu 'caller wywoła prepare_and_show
if trans_.isvar(GVAR_FORMUSAGE) then if trans_.var(GVAR_FORMUSAGE) = USAGE_DO_CHOICE then fopen = true exit function end if end if fopen = false dim nRaportType : nRaportType = trans_.var(APPVAR_RAPORT_TYPE)
'------ typeid (required) ----------- dim nTypeId if trans_.isvar(APPVAR_PARAM_TYPEID) then nTypeId = trans_.var(APPVAR_PARAM_TYPEID) else if trans_.isvar(GVAR_TYPEID) then nTypeId = trans_.var(GVAR_TYPEID) else #ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 1,0,"Missing TYPEID in hli. See source !!" #endif exit function end if end if '---- idobj (optional) --------- dim nIdObj if trans_.isvar(APPVAR_PARAM_IDOBJ) then nIdObj = trans_.var(APPVAR_PARAM_IDOBJ) else if trans_.isvar(GVAR_OBJECT) then nIdObj = trans_.var(GVAR_OBJECT) else nIdObj = 0 end if end if
'dummy here dim idChoosenTypeId,idChoosenIdObj
prepare_and_show nRaportType,nTypeId,nIdObj,false,idChoosenTypeId,idChoosenIdObj end function
function prepare_and_show(byval nRaportType,byval nTypeId,byval nIdObj,byval bDoChoice,byref idChoosenTypeid,byref idChoosenIdObj)
if not ensure_licence(nRaportType) then exit function end if
if not check_rights(nRaportType) then exit function end if
'-- configure -------- dim pTreeHost : set pTreeHost = select_host(nRaportType) dim pPB : set pPB = prepare_pb(pTreeHost,nRaportType,bDoChoice) if pPB is nothing then exit function end if dim pTreeDef : set pTreeDef = pTreeHost.prepare_explorer(pPB) fill_tree_def nRaportType,pTreeDef
pTreeHost.show pTreeDef,get_title(nRaportType),nTypeId,nIdObj if bDoChoice then idChoosenTypeid = pTreeHost.get_result_typeid() idChoosenIdObj = pTreeHost.get_result_idobj() end if end function
'------------------------------------------------------------ function select_host(nRaportType) select case nRaportType case EXPLORER_CUSTOMERS_BY_GROUPS set select_host = doc_.getmodule(43006) 'simple host, todo: 2-pane host case else set select_host = doc_.getmodule(43006) 'simple host end select end function '------------------------------------------------------------ ' '------------------------------------------------------------ function check_rights(byval nRaportType) : check_rights = true
select case nRaportType case EXPLORER_CUSTOMERS_BY_GROUPS check_rights = HARUI(cmdid2uar(CMDID_EXPLORER_CUSTOMERS)) case EXPLORER_DOCUMENTS_BY_GROUPS check_rights = HARUI(cmdid2uar(CMDID_EXPLORER_DOCUMENTS)) #ifdef _ABAKUS if check_rights then check_rights = not HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) end if #endif case EXPLORER_PRODUCTS_BY_GROUPS check_rights = HARUI(cmdid2uar(CMDID_EXPLORER_PRODUCTS)) case EXPLORER_TASKS_BY_TYPE check_rights = HARUI(cmdid2uar(CMDID_EXPLORER_TASKS)) case EXPLORER_TASKS_BY_CUSTOMER check_rights = HARUI(cmdid2uar(CMDID_EXPLORER_TASKS_BY_CUSTOMERS)) case EXPLORER_ACCOUNTS_HIERARCHY_PLAIN check_rights = HARUI(cmdid2uar(CMDID_EXPLORER_KONTA)) #ifdef _ABAKUS if check_rights then check_rights = not HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) end if #endif case EXPLORER_ACCOUNTS_HIERARCHY_RICH,EXPLORER_ACCOUNTS_HIERARCHY_RICH_PARAM check_rights = HARUI(cmdid2uar(CMDID_RAPORT_OBROTY_SALDA)) #ifdef _ABAKUS if check_rights then check_rights = not HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) end if #endif case EXPLORER_COMPANY check_rights = HARUI(cmdid2uar(CMDID_EXPLORER_FIRM)) #ifdef _ABAKUS if check_rights then check_rights = not HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) end if #endif case EXPLORER_FIXED_ASSETS check_rights = HARUI(cmdid2uar(CMDID_EXPLORER_SRTRW)) #ifdef _ABAKUS if check_rights then check_rights = not HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) end if #endif case EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS check_rights = HARUI(UAR_POWIAZANIA) end select end function
'------------------------------------------------------------
'------------------------------------------------------------ function ensure_licence(byval nRaportType) : ensure_licence = false dim nModMask : nModMask = 0 select case nRaportType case EXPLORER_CUSTOMERS_BY_GROUPS nModMask = EB_MOD_MASK_HANDEL or EB_MOD_MASK_KONTAKT case EXPLORER_DOCUMENTS_BY_GROUPS nModMask = EB_MOD_MASK_KONTAKT case EXPLORER_PRODUCTS_BY_GROUPS nModMask = EB_MOD_MASK_HANDEL or EB_MOD_MASK_KONTAKT or EB_MOD_MASK_MAGAZYN or EB_MOD_MASK_PRODUKCJA case EXPLORER_TASKS_BY_TYPE nModMask = EB_MOD_MASK_KONTAKT case EXPLORER_TASKS_BY_CUSTOMER nModMask = EB_MOD_MASK_KONTAKT case EXPLORER_ACCOUNTS_HIERARCHY_PLAIN nModMask = EB_MOD_MASK_FINANSE case EXPLORER_ACCOUNTS_HIERARCHY_RICH,EXPLORER_ACCOUNTS_HIERARCHY_RICH_PARAM nModMask = EB_MOD_MASK_FINANSE case EXPLORER_COMPANY nModMask = EB_MOD_MASK_HANDEL or EB_MOD_MASK_KONTAKT or EB_MOD_MASK_FINANSE or EB_MOD_MASK_PRODUKCJA or EB_MOD_MASK_PRACOWNIK case EXPLORER_FIXED_ASSETS nModMask = EB_MOD_MASK_FINANSE case EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS nModMask = EB_MOD_MASK_HANDEL or EB_MOD_MASK_MAGAZYN or EB_MOD_MASK_PRODUKCJA end select if nModMask = 0 then ensure_licence = true else ensure_licence = LicUMUI(nModMask) end if end function '------------------------------------------------------------ '------------------------------------------------------------ ' '------------------------------------------------------------ function prepare_pb(byref pTreeHost,byval nRaportType,byval bDoChoice) select case nRaportType case EXPLORER_CUSTOMERS_BY_GROUPS set prepare_pb = pTreeHost.new_custombuilder() case EXPLORER_DOCUMENTS_BY_GROUPS set prepare_pb = pTreeHost.new_custombuilder() case EXPLORER_PRODUCTS_BY_GROUPS set prepare_pb = prepare_pb_produkty(pTreeHost,nRaportType) case EXPLORER_TASKS_BY_TYPE set prepare_pb = pTreeHost.new_custombuilder() case EXPLORER_TASKS_BY_CUSTOMER set prepare_pb = pTreeHost.new_custombuilder() case EXPLORER_PLSCHEMATNAL_BY_GROUP set prepare_pb = pTreeHost.new_custombuilder() case EXPLORER_ACCOUNTS_HIERARCHY_PLAIN set prepare_pb = pTreeHost.new_custombuilder() case EXPLORER_ACCOUNTS_HIERARCHY_RICH,EXPLORER_ACCOUNTS_HIERARCHY_RICH_PARAM set prepare_pb = prepare_pb_zois(pTreeHost,nRaportType) case EXPLORER_COMPANY set prepare_pb = prepare_pb_company(pTreeHost,nRaportType) case EXPLORER_FIXED_ASSETS set prepare_pb = pTreeHost.new_custombuilder() case EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS set prepare_pb = pTreeHost.new_custombuilder() case EXPLORER_PROJEKT_BY_PROTOKOL set prepare_pb = pTreeHost.new_custombuilder() end select
if bDoChoice then if not prepare_pb is nothing then prepare_pb.set_hli_function "varFunctionHLI='on_item_selected_hli' appvarParamTypeid=%1 appvarParamIdobj=%2" end if end if
end function
#define TREE_COLSPAN 9
sub fill_tree_def(byval nRaportType,byref pTreeDef)
select case nRaportType case EXPLORER_CUSTOMERS_BY_GROUPS #ifdef _ABAKUS if HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) then pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,"pGrupaNadrzedna","c.strNazwa","IdObj in (select pGrupaKlient from n5klient where IdObj in (select IdObj from n5klient where pPracownik in (select n5pracownik.idobj from n5uzytkownik inner join n5wykonawca on n5uzytkownik.pWykonawca = n5wykonawca.idobj inner join n5pracownik on n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt = n5pracownik.idobj and n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt_wrt = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK where n5uzytkownik.idobj = " + CStr(getCurrentUserID()) + ")))",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,TYPEID_N5KLIENT,"pGrupaKlient","c.strNazwa","IdObj in (select IdObj from n5klient where pPracownik in (select n5pracownik.idobj from n5uzytkownik inner join n5wykonawca on n5uzytkownik.pWykonawca = n5wykonawca.idobj inner join n5pracownik on n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt = n5pracownik.idobj and n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt_wrt = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK where n5uzytkownik.idobj = " + CStr(getCurrentUserID()) + "))",false else pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,"pGrupaNadrzedna","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,TYPEID_N5KLIENT,"pGrupaKlient","c.strNazwa","",false end if #else pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,"pGrupaNadrzedna","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,TYPEID_N5KLIENT,"pGrupaKlient","c.strNazwa","",false #endif case EXPLORER_DOCUMENTS_BY_GROUPS pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5TYPDOKUMENTU,TYPEID_N5TYPDOKUMENTU,"pTypNadrzedny","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5TYPDOKUMENTU,TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT,"pTypDokumentu","c.strTematDokum","",false case EXPLORER_PRODUCTS_BY_GROUPS pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW,TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW,"pGrupaNadrzedna","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW,TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,"pGrupaProd","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_list_relation TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,"listOpakowania"
case EXPLORER_TASKS_BY_TYPE #ifdef _ABAKUS if HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) then pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,"pTypNadrzedny","c.strNazwa","IdObj in (select pTypDzialania from n5zadanie where pKlient in (select IdObj from n5klient where pPracownik in (select n5pracownik.idobj from n5uzytkownik inner join n5wykonawca on n5uzytkownik.pWykonawca = n5wykonawca.idobj inner join n5pracownik on n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt = n5pracownik.idobj and n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt_wrt = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK where n5uzytkownik.idobj = " + CStr(getCurrentUserID()) + ")))",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pTypDzialania","c.strTemat","(pPopZadanie =0 and pNadZadanie=0) and pKlient in (select IdObj from n5klient where pPracownik in (select n5pracownik.idobj from n5uzytkownik inner join n5wykonawca on n5uzytkownik.pWykonawca = n5wykonawca.idobj inner join n5pracownik on n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt = n5pracownik.idobj and n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt_wrt = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK where n5uzytkownik.idobj = " + CStr(getCurrentUserID()) + "))",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pPopZadanie","c.idobj","pKlient in (select IdObj from n5klient where pPracownik in (select n5pracownik.idobj from n5uzytkownik inner join n5wykonawca on n5uzytkownik.pWykonawca = n5wykonawca.idobj inner join n5pracownik on n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt = n5pracownik.idobj and n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt_wrt = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK where n5uzytkownik.idobj = " + CStr(getCurrentUserID()) + "))",false else pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,"pTypNadrzedny","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pTypDzialania","c.strTemat","(pPopZadanie =0 and pNadZadanie=0)",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pPopZadanie","c.idobj","",false end if #else pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,"pTypNadrzedny","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pTypDzialania","c.strTemat","(pPopZadanie =0 and pNadZadanie=0)",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pPopZadanie","c.idobj","",false #endif #ifdef _ABAS_INWESTYCJE pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_ZADANIA,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"Idobj","c.strTemat","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pNadZadanie","c.strTemat","",true pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,"pZadanie","c.strNrDok","",true pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC,"pZadanie","c.strNrDok","",true pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5DOWODKSIEG,"wrefDokZrod","c.strNrDok","wrefDokZrod_wrt=TYPEID_N5ZADANIE",true pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE,"pZadanie","c.strNrDok","",true pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,"pZadanie","c.strNrDok","",true pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD,"pZadanie","c.strNrDok","",true #endif case EXPLORER_TASKS_BY_CUSTOMER #ifdef _ABAKUS if HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) then pTreeDef.add_fixed_simple_text FIXED_ZADANIA,FIXED_ZADANIA_SKOJARZONE , "Zadania skojarzone z klientami",nothing pTreeDef.add_fixed_simple_text FIXED_ZADANIA,FIXED_ZADANIA_NIESKOJARZONE , "Zadania nieskojarzone",nothing pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_ZADANIA_SKOJARZONE,TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,"pGrupaNadrzedna","c.strNazwa","IdObj in (select pGrupaKlient from n5klient where IdObj in (select IdObj from n5klient where pPracownik in (select n5pracownik.idobj from n5uzytkownik inner join n5wykonawca on n5uzytkownik.pWykonawca = n5wykonawca.idobj inner join n5pracownik on n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt = n5pracownik.idobj and n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt_wrt = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK where n5uzytkownik.idobj = " + CStr(getCurrentUserID()) + ")))",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,TYPEID_N5KLIENT,"pGrupaKlient","c.strNazwa","%child_table%.idobj in (select pklient from n5zadanie) and IdObj in (select IdObj from n5klient where pPracownik in (select n5pracownik.idobj from n5uzytkownik inner join n5wykonawca on n5uzytkownik.pWykonawca = n5wykonawca.idobj inner join n5pracownik on n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt = n5pracownik.idobj and n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt_wrt = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK where n5uzytkownik.idobj = " + CStr(getCurrentUserID()) + "))",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5KLIENT,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pKlient","c.idobj","(pPopZadanie =0 and pNadZadanie=0) and pKlient in (select IdObj from n5klient where pPracownik in (select n5pracownik.idobj from n5uzytkownik inner join n5wykonawca on n5uzytkownik.pWykonawca = n5wykonawca.idobj inner join n5pracownik on n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt = n5pracownik.idobj and n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt_wrt = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK where n5uzytkownik.idobj = " + CStr(getCurrentUserID()) + "))",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pPopZadanie","c.idobj","pKlient in (select IdObj from n5klient where pPracownik in (select n5pracownik.idobj from n5uzytkownik inner join n5wykonawca on n5uzytkownik.pWykonawca = n5wykonawca.idobj inner join n5pracownik on n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt = n5pracownik.idobj and n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt_wrt = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK where n5uzytkownik.idobj = " + CStr(getCurrentUserID()) + "))",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pNadZadanie","c.idobj","pKlient in (select IdObj from n5klient where pPracownik in (select n5pracownik.idobj from n5uzytkownik inner join n5wykonawca on n5uzytkownik.pWykonawca = n5wykonawca.idobj inner join n5pracownik on n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt = n5pracownik.idobj and n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt_wrt = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK where n5uzytkownik.idobj = " + CStr(getCurrentUserID()) + "))",false pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_ZADANIA_NIESKOJARZONE,TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,"pTypNadrzedny","c.strNazwa","IdObj in (select pTypDzialania from n5zadanie where pKlient in (select IdObj from n5klient where pPracownik in (select n5pracownik.idobj from n5uzytkownik inner join n5wykonawca on n5uzytkownik.pWykonawca = n5wykonawca.idobj inner join n5pracownik on n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt = n5pracownik.idobj and n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt_wrt = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK where n5uzytkownik.idobj = " + CStr(getCurrentUserID()) + ")))",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,"pTypNadrzedny","c.strNazwa","IdObj in (select pTypDzialania from n5zadanie where pKlient in (select IdObj from n5klient where pPracownik in (select n5pracownik.idobj from n5uzytkownik inner join n5wykonawca on n5uzytkownik.pWykonawca = n5wykonawca.idobj inner join n5pracownik on n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt = n5pracownik.idobj and n5wykonawca.wrefObiekt_wrt = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK where n5uzytkownik.idobj = " + CStr(getCurrentUserID()) + ")))",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pTypDzialania","c.strTemat","(pPopZadanie =0 and pNadZadanie=0 and pKlient=0)",false else pTreeDef.add_fixed_simple_text FIXED_ZADANIA,FIXED_ZADANIA_SKOJARZONE , "Zadania skojarzone z klientami",nothing pTreeDef.add_fixed_simple_text FIXED_ZADANIA,FIXED_ZADANIA_NIESKOJARZONE , "Zadania nieskojarzone",nothing pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_ZADANIA_SKOJARZONE,TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,"pGrupaNadrzedna","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,TYPEID_N5KLIENT,"pGrupaKlient","c.strNazwa","%child_table%.idobj in (select pklient from n5zadanie)",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5KLIENT,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pKlient","c.idobj","(pPopZadanie =0 and pNadZadanie=0)",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pPopZadanie","c.idobj","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pNadZadanie","c.idobj","",false pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_ZADANIA_NIESKOJARZONE,TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,"pTypNadrzedny","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,"pTypNadrzedny","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pTypDzialania","c.strTemat","(pPopZadanie =0 and pNadZadanie=0 and pKlient=0)",false end if #else pTreeDef.add_fixed_simple_text FIXED_ZADANIA,FIXED_ZADANIA_SKOJARZONE , "Zadania skojarzone z klientami",nothing pTreeDef.add_fixed_simple_text FIXED_ZADANIA,FIXED_ZADANIA_NIESKOJARZONE , "Zadania nieskojarzone",nothing pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_ZADANIA_SKOJARZONE,TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,"pGrupaNadrzedna","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT,TYPEID_N5KLIENT,"pGrupaKlient","c.strNazwa","%child_table%.idobj in (select pklient from n5zadanie)",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5KLIENT,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pKlient","c.idobj","(pPopZadanie =0 and pNadZadanie=0)",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pPopZadanie","c.idobj","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pNadZadanie","c.idobj","",false pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_ZADANIA_NIESKOJARZONE,TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,"pTypNadrzedny","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,"pTypNadrzedny","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,"pTypDzialania","c.strTemat","(pPopZadanie =0 and pNadZadanie=0 and pKlient=0)",false #endif case EXPLORER_PLSCHEMATNAL_BY_GROUP pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5PLGRUPASCHEMNAL,TYPEID_N5PLGRUPASCHEMNAL,"pGrupaNadrzedna","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5PLGRUPASCHEMNAL,TYPEID_N5PLSCHEMATNAL,"pGrupaSchemNal","c.strNazwa","",false
case EXPLORER_ACCOUNTS_HIERARCHY_PLAIN, EXPLORER_ACCOUNTS_HIERARCHY_RICH,EXPLORER_ACCOUNTS_HIERARCHY_RICH_PARAM
'to_do: config according to USERPROF_PLANKONT_ 'USERPROF_PLANKONT_AKTYWNE 'USERPROF_PLANKONT_BILANSOWE 'strona do ustawiania opcji: 20528
'len(strSymbol) < 4 = filtr na syntetykę !! #ifdef _DENIS pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5KONTO,TYPEID_N5KONTO,"pKontoNadrz","dbo.ks_lex_order(c.strSymbol)","eAktywne = N5KONTO_AKTYWNE",false #else pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5KONTO,TYPEID_N5KONTO,"pKontoNadrz","dbo.ks_lex_order(c.strSymbol)","",false #endif case EXPLORER_COMPANY pTreeDef.add_fixed_simple_text TYPEID_N5FIRMA,FIXED_JO,"Jednostki organizacyjne",nothing pTreeDef.add_fixed_simple_text TYPEID_N5FIRMA,FIXED_KSIEGOWOSC,"Księgowość",nothing pTreeDef.add_fixed_simple_text TYPEID_N5FIRMA,FIXED_REJESTRY_DOK,"Rejestry dokumentów",nothing pTreeDef.add_fixed_simple_text TYPEID_N5FIRMA,FIXED_MAGAZYNY,"Magazyny",nothing pTreeDef.add_fixed_simple_text TYPEID_N5FIRMA,FIXED_PRACOWNICY,"Pracownicy",nothing pTreeDef.add_fixed_simple_text TYPEID_N5FIRMA,FIXED_SRTRW,"Środki trwałe",nothing
pTreeDef.add_fixed_simple_text FIXED_KSIEGOWOSC,FIXED_PLAN_KONT,"Plan kont", _ doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=THIS_FILE appvar_raport_type=EXPLORER_ACCOUNTS_HIERARCHY_PLAIN appvarParamTypeid=TYPEID_N5KONTO varNewThread=1")
pTreeDef.add_fixed TYPEID_N5JEDN_ORG,FIXED_JO_PRACOW,getref("fixeditem_prac_in_jo") pTreeDef.add_fixed TYPEID_N5JEDN_ORG,FIXED_JO_SRTRW,getref("fixeditem_srtrw_in_jo")
pTreeDef.add_fixed_simple_text FIXED_KSIEGOWOSC,FIXED_DZIENNIKI,"Dzienniki",nothing pTreeDef.add_fixed_simple_text FIXED_KSIEGOWOSC,FIXED_LATA_KSIEGOWE,"Lata księgowe",nothing pTreeDef.add_fixed FIXED_REJESTRY_DOK,FIXED_TYP_REJ,getref("fixeditem_typrej")
pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_JO,TYPEID_N5JEDN_ORG,"p_Jend_Org_Nadrzedna","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5JEDN_ORG,TYPEID_N5JEDN_ORG,"p_Jend_Org_Nadrzedna","c.strNazwa","",false
pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_PLAN_KONT,TYPEID_N5KONTO,"pKontoNadrz","dbo.ks_lex_order(c.strSymbol)","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5KONTO,TYPEID_N5KONTO,"pKontoNadrz","dbo.ks_lex_order(c.strSymbol)","",false
pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_JO_PRACOW,TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK,"pJednostkaOrg","c.strNazwisko","",false pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_JO_SRTRW,TYPEID_N5SRTRW,"pMUJO","c.strNazwa","",false
pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_MAGAZYNY,TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN,"","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_PRACOWNICY,TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK,"","c.strNazwisko","",false
pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_LATA_KSIEGOWE,TYPEID_N5ROKKSIEG,"","c.dDataRozp","",false pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_DZIENNIKI,TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK,"","c.strNazwa","eTyp=N5REJESTRDOK_DZIENNIK_NORM",false
pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_TYP_REJ,TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK,"eTyp","c.strNazwa","",false
pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_SRTRW,TYPEID_N5GRUPASRTRW,"","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPASRTRW,TYPEID_N5GRUPASRTRW,"pGrupaNadrzedna","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPASRTRW,TYPEID_N5SRTRW,"pGrupa","c.strNazwa","",false case EXPLORER_FIXED_ASSETS pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPASRTRW,TYPEID_N5GRUPASRTRW,"pGrupaNadrzedna","c.strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5GRUPASRTRW,TYPEID_N5SRTRW,"pGrupa","c.strNazwa","",false case EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_ZAMOWIENIE_ROOT,TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE,"Idobj","c.strNrDok","",false pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_ZAKUP_ROOT,TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,"Idobj","c.strNrDok","",false pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_FAKTURA_ROOT,TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,"Idobj","c.strNrDok","",false
pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE,TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,"pZamowienie","c.strNrDok","",true pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE,TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,"wrefDokHandl","c.strNrDok","wrefDokHandl_wrt=TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE",true pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE,TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD,"pZamowienie","c.strNrDok","",true pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE,TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,"pZamowienie","c.strNrDok","",true pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE,TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE,"pZamowienie","c.strNrDok","",true
pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,"pPopSprzed","c.strNrDok","",true pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,"pFaktura","c.strNrDok","",true #ifdef ENABLE_DB12 pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,"sprzed_pDostawa","c.strNrDok","",true #endif pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ,TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,"wrefDokHandl","c.strNrDok","wrefDokHandl_wrt=TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ",true
pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_DOKMAG_ROOT,TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,"IdObj","c.strNrDok","",true pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,"pDokMag","c.strNrDok","",true pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_ZLECPROD_ROOT,TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD,"Idobj","c.strNrDok","",false pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_REALPROD_ROOT,TYPEID_N5REALPROD,"IdObj","c.strNrDok","",true #ifdef APPCONFIG_DOSTAWA_WEGLA pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE,"curExtra4","c.strNrDok","",true #endif
pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD,TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,"wrefDokHandl","c.strNrDok","wrefDokHandl_wrt=TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD",true pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD,TYPEID_N5REALPROD,"pZlecProd","c.strNrDok","",true pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD,TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD,"pNadZlec","c.strNrDok","",true
pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,"pPopZakup","c.strNrDok","",true pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5ZAKUP,TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,"wrefDokHandl","c.strNrDok","wrefDokHandl_wrt=TYPEID_N5ZAKUP",true
case EXPLORER_PROJEKT_BY_PROTOKOL pTreeDef.add_relation FIXED_N5PROJEKT_ABAS_ROOT,TYPEID_N5PROJEKT_ABAS,"Idobj","c.proj_strNazwa","",false pTreeDef.add_relation TYPEID_N5PROJEKT_ABAS,TYPEID_N5PROTOKOL_ABAS,"prot_pProjekt","c.prot_strNrDok","",false
end select end sub
function get_title(byval nRaportType) select case nRaportType case EXPLORER_CUSTOMERS_BY_GROUPS get_title = "Klienci" case EXPLORER_DOCUMENTS_BY_GROUPS get_title = "Dokumenty" case EXPLORER_PRODUCTS_BY_GROUPS get_title = "Produkty" case EXPLORER_TASKS_BY_TYPE get_title = "Działania wg typów" case EXPLORER_TASKS_BY_CUSTOMER get_title = "Działania wg klientów" case EXPLORER_PLSCHEMATNAL_BY_GROUP get_title = "Schematy wg grup" case EXPLORER_ACCOUNTS_HIERARCHY_PLAIN get_title = "Plan kont" case EXPLORER_ACCOUNTS_HIERARCHY_RICH,EXPLORER_ACCOUNTS_HIERARCHY_RICH_PARAM get_title = "Zestawienie obrotów i sald" case EXPLORER_COMPANY get_title = getCurrentFirma().strNazwa case EXPLORER_FIXED_ASSETS get_title = "Środki trwałe" case EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS get_title = "Proces produkcji i sprzedaży" case EXPLORER_PROJEKT_BY_PROTOKOL get_title = "Protokoły" end select end function
'------------------------------------------------------------ 'produkty '------------------------------------------------------------
function prepare_pb_produkty(byref pTreeHost,byval nRaportType) dim pPB : set pPB = pTreeHost.new_custombuilder()
'-- oblicz ile cen jest używanych dim nPricesInUse : nPricesInUse = 6 pPB.extracols = nPricesInUse
pPB.set_extra_builder getref("produkty_tree_extra")
set prepare_pb_produkty = pPB end function
function produkty_tree_extra(byref pFEC,byref pObject) 'pFEC - first extra cell if pObject.type = TYPEID_N5OPAKOWANIE_PRODUKTU then
pFEC.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pFEC.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = doc_.afc.display.money(pObject.curCenaNetto1,pObject.pWaluta.strSkrot) pFEC.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) set pFEC = pFEC.nextelement
pFEC.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pFEC.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = doc_.afc.display.money(pObject.curCenaNetto2,pObject.pWaluta.strSkrot) pFEC.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) set pFEC = pFEC.nextelement
pFEC.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pFEC.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = doc_.afc.display.money(pObject.curCenaNetto3,pObject.pWaluta.strSkrot) pFEC.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) set pFEC = pFEC.nextelement
pFEC.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pFEC.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = doc_.afc.display.money(pObject.curCenaNetto4,pObject.pWaluta.strSkrot) pFEC.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) set pFEC = pFEC.nextelement
pFEC.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pFEC.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = doc_.afc.display.money(pObject.curCenaNetto5,pObject.pWaluta.strSkrot) pFEC.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) set pFEC = pFEC.nextelement
pFEC.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pFEC.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = doc_.afc.display.money(pObject.curCenaNetto6,pObject.pWaluta.strSkrot) pFEC.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) set pFEC = pFEC.nextelement end if end function '------------------------------------------------------------ 'zestawienie obrotów i sald '------------------------------------------------------------ #ifdef _TORAL #define EXTRA_COLS_ZOIS 10 #else #define EXTRA_COLS_ZOIS 10 #endif
dim g_pKontoInfoMan : set g_pKontoInfoMan = nothing 'tylko bilansowe dim g_pKontoInfoMan_BILANS : set g_pKontoInfoMan_BILANS = nothing
#ifdef _ALMA_TREND 'wszystkie EUR dim g_pKontoInfoManEUR : set g_pKontoInfoManEUR = nothing 'tylko bilansowe EUR dim g_pKontoInfoMan_BILANS_EUR : set g_pKontoInfoMan_BILANS_EUR = nothing #endif
sub compute_zois(dDateStart,dDateEnd,byref pParChoiceStatus,byref pParChoiceColums,byval idKwalifikator) dim pPerf : set pPerf = doc_.performing("Trwa obliczanie ...") dim pPM : set pPM = doc_.getmodule(60159) set g_pKontoInfoMan = pPM.prepare_zois(dDateStart,dDateEnd,pParChoiceStatus,nothing,pParChoiceColums,idKwalifikator)
#ifdef _SECURITY set g_pKontoInfoMan_BILANS = pPM.prepare_zois_bilans_filter(dDateStart,dDateEnd,pParChoiceStatus,nothing,pParChoiceColums,idKwalifikator,false) #else set g_pKontoInfoMan_BILANS = pPM.prepare_zois_bilans_filter(dDateStart,dDateEnd,pParChoiceStatus,nothing,pParChoiceColums,idKwalifikator,true) #endif
#ifdef _ALMA_TREND set g_pKontoInfoManEUR = pPM.prepare_zois_bilans_filter_ex_2(dDateStart,dDateEnd,pParChoiceStatus,"",pParChoiceColums,idKwalifikator,false,"EUR") set g_pKontoInfoMan_BILANS_EUR = pPM.prepare_zois_bilans_filter_ex_2(dDateStart,dDateEnd,pParChoiceStatus,"",pParChoiceColums,idKwalifikator,true,"EUR") #endif
end sub
#define SIZE_DO_ROZEPCHANIA 12
function prepare_pb_zois(byref pTreeHost,byval nRaportType) #ifdef _SECURITY if trans_.var(GVAR_DBNAME) = "navo2002trio" then if MessageBox("Czy chcesz aktualizować dane w bazie navo2002trio ", "Aktualizowanie danych...", vbYesNo, vbQuestion) = vbYes then ' aktualizacja danych - pobranie z navo200 i navo2002bis na potrzeby analiz finansowych dim pM60159 : set pM60159 = doc_.getmodule(60159) if pM60159.wczytaj_dane_trio() then end if end if end if #endif
set prepare_pb_zois = nothing dim pPB : set pPB = pTreeHost.new_custombuilder()
'--- build header row dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pTreeHost.get_dest_table).section_head pTB.newrow.row.styleitem = STYLE_DESC_ROW
#ifdef _FRAM with pTB.newcell.cell .colspan = TREE_COLSPAN+2 .rowspan =2 end with pTB.addtext "Symbol" #else with pTB.newcell.cell .colspan = TREE_COLSPAN .rowspan = 2 end with pTB.addtext "Symbol" #endif #ifndef _TORAL pTB.newcell.addtext("BO").cell.colspan = 2 #else pTB.newcell.addtext("BO saldo").cell.colspan = 2 #endif pTB.newcell.addtext("Obroty w okresie").cell.colspan = 2 pTB.newcell.addtext("Obroty narastająco").cell.colspan = 2 pTB.newcell.addtext("Saldo").cell.colspan = 2 pTB.newcell.addtext("Saldo sald").cell.colspan = 2 pTB.newrow.row.styleitem = STYLE_DESC_ROW pTB.newcell.addtext("Wn").element.size=SIZE_DO_ROZEPCHANIA pTB.newcell.addtext("Ma").element.size=SIZE_DO_ROZEPCHANIA pTB.newcell.addtext("Wn").element.size=SIZE_DO_ROZEPCHANIA pTB.newcell.addtext("Ma").element.size=SIZE_DO_ROZEPCHANIA pTB.newcell.addtext("Wn").element.size=SIZE_DO_ROZEPCHANIA pTB.newcell.addtext("Ma").element.size=SIZE_DO_ROZEPCHANIA pTB.newcell.addtext("Wn").element.size=SIZE_DO_ROZEPCHANIA pTB.newcell.addtext("Ma").element.size=SIZE_DO_ROZEPCHANIA pTB.newcell.addtext("Wn").element.size=SIZE_DO_ROZEPCHANIA pTB.newcell.addtext("Ma").element.size=SIZE_DO_ROZEPCHANIA
'--- setup presentation builder pPB.extracols = EXTRA_COLS_ZOIS
pPB.set_extra_builder getref("zois_tree_extra")
if nRaportType = EXPLORER_ACCOUNTS_HIERARCHY_RICH_PARAM then dim pParamArray : set pParamArray = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() dim pParamFactory: set pParamFactory = doc_.afc.rap.param
dim pParamDate : set pParamDate = doc_.afc.rap.param.new_date_range("Analizowany okres") pParamArray.add pParamDate
dim pParamKwalifikator : set pParamKwalifikator = pParamFactory.new_choice("Kwalifikator") pParamKwalifikator.multiple = false pParamFactory.init_on_query pParamKwalifikator, trans_, _ "select strNazwa,idobj from n5kwalifikator union select '<dowolny>',-1 union select '<brak>', 0 order by 1" pParamArray.add pParamKwalifikator
dim pDialogBuilder : set pDialogBuilder = doc_.afc.rap.new_param_dlg(pParamArray , trans_ , "Zestawienie obrotów i sald") dim pSO : set pSO = doc_.createstreamobj pSO.write pDialogBuilder.get_all()
'wyświetl stronę dim hli : set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE") set hli.prop(GVAR_DESTPAGE) = pSO.getstream set pSO = nothing dim pDialogPage : set pDialogPage = doc_.getpagehli(hli) dim nResult : nResult= pDialogPage.domodalauto() if nResult <> 0 then pDialogBuilder.update_params(pDialogPage) else exit function end if
'todo: na razie łata bo RapParamDateRange nie ustawia m_Last pParamDate.get_where_part trans_ if pParamDate.mode = 1 then 'any date pParamDate.first_value = getCurrentRKS().dDataRozp pParamDate.last_value = getCurrentRKS().dDataZakon end if
'ograniczenie do biezacego roku ksiegowego pParamDate.get_where_part trans_ if pParamDate.mode = 1 then 'any date pParamDate.first_value = getCurrentRKS().dDataRozp pParamDate.last_value = getCurrentRKS().dDataZakon end if if pParamDate.mode = 5 then 'do dnia pParamDate.last_value = pParamDate.first_value pParamDate.first_value = getCurrentRKS().dDataRozp end if if pParamDate.mode = 6 then 'od dnia pParamDate.last_value = getCurrentRKS().dDataZakon end if
compute_zois pParamDate.first_value, pParamDate.last_value,nothing,nothing, _ pParamKwalifikator.values.Value(pParamKwalifikator.first_selected) else
compute_zois getCurrentRKS().dDataRozp, trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY),nothing,nothing,-1 end if
'--- build footer row set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pTreeHost.get_dest_table).section_foot pTB.newrow.row.bold = true #ifdef _FRAM pTB.newcell.cell.colspan = TREE_COLSPAN+1 #else pTB.newcell.cell.colspan = TREE_COLSPAN #endif
#ifdef _ALMA_TREND pTB.addtext "Suma bilansowe" #else pTB.addtext "Suma" #endif
dim pFEC : set pFEC = pTB.newcell.cell dim iter for iter = 2 to EXTRA_COLS_ZOIS pTB.newcell next
'zois_tree_extra_idkonto pFEC,0 zois_tree_extra_idkonto_EX pFEC,0,g_pKontoInfoMan_BILANS
#ifdef _ALMA_TREND pTB.newrow.row.bold = true pTB.newcell.cell.colspan = TREE_COLSPAN pTB.addtext "Suma pozabilansowe PLN" set pFEC = pTB.newcell.cell for iter = 2 to EXTRA_COLS_ZOIS pTB.newcell next zois_tree_extra_idkonto_bezbil pFEC, 0, false
pTB.newrow.row.bold = true pTB.newcell.cell.colspan = TREE_COLSPAN pTB.addtext "Suma pozabilansowe EUR" set pFEC = pTB.newcell.cell for iter = 2 to EXTRA_COLS_ZOIS pTB.newcell next zois_tree_extra_idkonto_bezbil pFEC, 0, true #endif
pTB.newrow.row.bold = true #ifdef _PAKART pTB.newcell.cell.colspan = TREE_COLSPAN #else pTB.newcell.cell.colspan = TREE_COLSPAN+1 #endif with pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1).element .text = "Raport" '.styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON .backcolor=rgb(171,190,230) .backcolor2=rgb(255,255,255) set .hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_ZAPISY_NA_KONTACH appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_ZESTAWIENIE_OBROTOW_I_SALD") end with #ifdef _ALMA_TREND pTB.newrow pTB.row.fontsize = 1 pTB.newcell.cell.colspan = TREE_COLSPAN+2 pTB.addtext "Dokument wyemitowany przez EuroBusiness 5.0" #endif #ifdef _PAKART pTB.newcell with pTB.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1).element .text = "Wydruk" .backcolor=rgb(171,190,230) .backcolor2=rgb(255,255,255) set .hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_RAPORT_ZAPISY_NA_KONTACH appvar_raport_type=RAPTEMPLATE_ZEST_OBR_I_SALD_WYDRUK_IGLOWY") end with #endif set prepare_pb_zois = pPB end function
private function fill_fec(byref pFEC,byref curVal,byval strUnit,byval bEvenCol) with pFEC .align = ALIGN_RIGHT .addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = doc_.afc.display.money(curVal,strUnit) if bEvenCol then .styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD end if .bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) set fill_fec = .nextelement end with end function
function zois_tree_extra_idkonto(byref pFEC,byval idKonto) zois_tree_extra_idkonto_EX pFEC , idKonto , nothing end function
function zois_tree_extra_idkonto_bezbil(byref pFEC,byval idKonto, byval bMode) dim strUnit : strUnit = "" 'wszystkie dim pKontoInfo: set pKontoInfo = g_pKontoInfoMan.kontoinfo(idKonto) 'bilansowe dim pKontoInfoBilas: set pKontoInfoBilas = g_pKontoInfoMan_BILANS.kontoinfo(idKonto)
'wszyskie pozabilansowe dim curBO_Wn: curBO_Wn = ccur(0) dim curBO_Ma: curBO_Ma = ccur(0) dim curObrO_Wn: curObrO_Wn = ccur(0) dim curObrO_Ma: curObrO_Ma = ccur(0) dim curObrN_Wn: curObrN_Wn = ccur(0) dim curObrN_Ma: curObrN_Ma = ccur(0) dim curSalN_Wn: curSalN_Wn = ccur(0) dim curSalN_Ma: curSalN_Ma = ccur(0) dim curSaSN_Wn: curSaSN_Wn = ccur(0) dim curSaSN_Ma: curSaSN_Ma = ccur(0)
if pKontoInfo.m_curBO_Wn - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curBO_Wn > ccur(0) then curBO_Wn = pKontoInfo.m_curBO_Wn - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curBO_Wn end if if pKontoInfo.m_curBO_Ma - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curBO_Ma > ccur(0) then curBO_Ma = pKontoInfo.m_curBO_Ma - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curBO_Ma end if if pKontoInfo.m_curObrO_Wn - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curObrO_Wn > ccur(0) then curObrO_Wn = pKontoInfo.m_curObrO_Wn - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curObrO_Wn end if if pKontoInfo.m_curObrO_Ma - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curObrO_Ma > ccur(0) then curObrO_Ma = pKontoInfo.m_curObrO_Ma - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curObrO_Ma end if if pKontoInfo.m_curObrN_Wn - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curObrN_Wn > ccur(0) then curObrN_Wn = pKontoInfo.m_curObrN_Wn - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curObrN_Wn end if if pKontoInfo.m_curObrN_Ma - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curObrN_Ma > ccur(0) then curObrN_Ma = pKontoInfo.m_curObrN_Ma - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curObrN_Ma end if if pKontoInfo.m_curSalN_Wn - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curSalN_Wn > ccur(0) then curSalN_Wn = pKontoInfo.m_curSalN_Wn - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curSalN_Wn end if if pKontoInfo.m_curSalN_Ma - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curSalN_Ma > ccur(0) then curSalN_Ma = pKontoInfo.m_curSalN_Ma - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curSalN_Ma end if if pKontoInfo.m_curSaSN_Wn - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curSaSN_Wn > ccur(0) then curSaSN_Wn = pKontoInfo.m_curSaSN_Wn - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curSaSN_Wn end if if pKontoInfo.m_curSaSN_Ma - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curSaSN_Ma > ccur(0) then curSaSN_Ma = pKontoInfo.m_curSaSN_Ma - pKontoInfoBilas.m_curSaSN_Ma end if
'wszystkie w EUR dim pKontoInfoEUR: set pKontoInfoEUR = g_pKontoInfoManEUR.kontoinfo(idKonto) 'bilansowe w EUR dim pKontoInfoBilansEUR: set pKontoInfoBilansEUR = g_pKontoInfoMan_BILANS_EUR.kontoinfo(idKonto)
'pozabilansowe EUR dim curBO_Wn_EUR: curBO_Wn_EUR = ccur(0) dim curBO_Ma_EUR: curBO_Ma_EUR = ccur(0) dim curObrO_Wn_EUR: curObrO_Wn_EUR = ccur(0) dim curObrO_Ma_EUR: curObrO_Ma_EUR = ccur(0) dim curObrN_Wn_EUR: curObrN_Wn_EUR = ccur(0) dim curObrN_Ma_EUR: curObrN_Ma_EUR = ccur(0) dim curSalN_Wn_EUR: curSalN_Wn_EUR = ccur(0) dim curSalN_Ma_EUR: curSalN_Ma_EUR = ccur(0) dim curSaSN_Wn_EUR: curSaSN_Wn_EUR = ccur(0) dim curSaSN_Ma_EUR: curSaSN_Ma_EUR = ccur(0)
if pKontoInfoEUR.m_curBO_Wn - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curBO_Wn > ccur(0) then curBO_Wn_EUR = pKontoInfoEUR.m_curBO_Wn - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curBO_Wn end if if pKontoInfoEUR.m_curBO_Ma - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curBO_Ma > ccur(0) then curBO_Ma_EUR = pKontoInfoEUR.m_curBO_Ma - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curBO_Ma end if if pKontoInfoEUR.m_curObrO_Wn - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curObrO_Wn > ccur(0) then curObrO_Wn_EUR = pKontoInfoEUR.m_curObrO_Wn - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curObrO_Wn end if if pKontoInfoEUR.m_curObrO_Ma - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curObrO_Ma > ccur(0) then curObrO_Ma_EUR = pKontoInfoEUR.m_curObrO_Ma - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curObrO_Ma end if if pKontoInfoEUR.m_curObrN_Wn - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curObrN_Wn > ccur(0) then curObrN_Wn_EUR = pKontoInfoEUR.m_curObrN_Wn - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curObrN_Wn end if if pKontoInfoEUR.m_curObrN_Ma - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curObrN_Ma > ccur(0) then curObrN_Ma_EUR = pKontoInfoEUR.m_curObrN_Ma - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curObrN_Ma end if if pKontoInfoEUR.m_curSalN_Wn - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curSalN_Wn > ccur(0) then curSalN_Wn_EUR = pKontoInfoEUR.m_curSalN_Wn - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curSalN_Wn end if if pKontoInfoEUR.m_curSalN_Ma - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curSalN_Ma > ccur(0) then curSalN_Ma_EUR = pKontoInfoEUR.m_curSalN_Ma - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curSalN_Ma end if if pKontoInfoEUR.m_curSaSN_Wn - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curSaSN_Wn > ccur(0) then curSaSN_Wn_EUR = pKontoInfoEUR.m_curSaSN_Wn - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curSaSN_Wn end if if pKontoInfoEUR.m_curSaSN_Ma - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curSaSN_Ma > ccur(0) then curSaSN_Ma_EUR = pKontoInfoEUR.m_curSaSN_Ma - pKontoInfoBilansEUR.m_curSaSN_Ma end if
if bMode then 'pozabilansowe w EUR fill_fec fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec( _ pFEC,curBO_Wn_EUR,strUnit,true) _ ,curBO_Ma_EUR,strUnit,false) _ ,curObrO_Wn_EUR,strUnit,true) _ ,curObrO_Ma_EUR,strUnit,false) _ ,curObrN_Wn_EUR,strUnit,true) _ ,curObrN_Ma_EUR,strUnit,false) _ ,curSalN_Wn_EUR,strUnit,true) _ ,curSalN_Ma_EUR,strUnit,false) _ ,curSaSN_Wn_EUR,strUnit,true) _ ,curSaSN_Ma_EUR,strUnit,false else 'pozabilansowe PLN fill_fec fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec( _ pFEC,curBO_Wn - curBO_Wn_EUR,strUnit,true) _ ,curBO_Ma - curBO_Ma_EUR,strUnit,false) _ ,curObrO_Wn - curObrO_Wn_EUR,strUnit,true) _ ,curObrO_Ma - curObrO_Ma_EUR,strUnit,false) _ ,curObrN_Wn - curObrN_Wn_EUR,strUnit,true) _ ,curObrN_Ma - curObrN_Ma_EUR,strUnit,false) _ ,curSalN_Wn - curSalN_Wn_EUR,strUnit,true) _ ,curSalN_Ma - curSalN_Ma_EUR,strUnit,false) _ ,curSaSN_Wn - curSaSN_Wn_EUR,strUnit,true) _ ,curSaSN_Ma - curSaSN_Ma_EUR,strUnit,false end if end function
function zois_tree_extra_idkonto_EX(byref pFEC,byval idKonto , byval KontoMan) 'pFEC - first extra cell dim strUnit : strUnit = "" dim pKontoInfo if KontoMan is nothing then set pKontoInfo = g_pKontoInfoMan.kontoinfo(idKonto) else set pKontoInfo = KontoMan.kontoinfo(idKonto) end if
#ifdef APPCONFIG_SUMA_SALDO_SALD 'saldo sald podsumowanie if not KontoMan is nothing then dim pKInfo dim pCursKonta : set pCursKonta = trans_.createadors("select idobj from n5konto where pKontoNadrz = 0") do while not pCursKonta.EOF set pKInfo = KontoMan.kontoinfo(clng(pCursKonta(0))) pKontoInfo.m_curSaSN_Wn = pKontoInfo.m_curSaSN_Wn + pKInfo.m_curSaSN_Wn pKontoInfo.m_curSaSN_Ma = pKontoInfo.m_curSaSN_Ma + pKInfo.m_curSaSN_Ma pCursKonta.movenext loop end if #endif
#ifdef _TORAL 'BO saldo dim curBO_WnSal: curBO_WnSal = ccur(0) dim curBO_MaSal: curBO_MaSal = ccur(0) if pKontoInfo.m_curBO_Wn > pKontoInfo.m_curBO_Ma then curBO_WnSal = pKontoInfo.m_curBO_Wn - pKontoInfo.m_curBO_Ma end if if pKontoInfo.m_curBO_Ma > pKontoInfo.m_curBO_Wn then curBO_MaSal = pKontoInfo.m_curBO_Ma - pKontoInfo.m_curBO_Wn end if
'BO saldo z podsumowaniem if not KontoMan is nothing then dim pKInfo dim curBufBO_WnSal: curBufBO_WnSal = ccur(0.0) dim curBufBO_MaSal: curBufBO_MaSal = ccur(0.0) dim pCursKonta : set pCursKonta = trans_.createadors("select idobj from n5konto where pKontoNadrz = 0") do while not pCursKonta.EOF set pKInfo = KontoMan.kontoinfo(clng(pCursKonta(0))) if pKInfo.m_curBO_Wn > pKInfo.m_curBO_Ma then curBufBO_WnSal = pKInfo.m_curBO_Wn - pKInfo.m_curBO_Ma curBO_WnSal = curBO_WnSal + curBufBO_WnSal end if if pKInfo.m_curBO_Ma > pKInfo.m_curBO_Wn then curBufBO_MaSal = pKInfo.m_curBO_Ma - pKInfo.m_curBO_Wn curBO_MaSal = curBO_MaSal + curBufBO_MaSal end if pCursKonta.movenext loop end if
fill_fec fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec( _ pFEC,curBO_WnSal,strUnit,true) _ ,curBO_MaSal,strUnit,false) _ ,pKontoInfo.m_curObrO_Wn,strUnit,true) _ ,pKontoInfo.m_curObrO_Ma,strUnit,false) _ ,pKontoInfo.m_curObrN_Wn,strUnit,true) _ ,pKontoInfo.m_curObrN_Ma,strUnit,false) _ ,pKontoInfo.m_curSalN_Wn,strUnit,true) _ ,pKontoInfo.m_curSalN_Ma,strUnit,false) _ ,pKontoInfo.m_curSaSN_Wn,strUnit,true) _ ,pKontoInfo.m_curSaSN_Ma,strUnit,false #else fill_fec fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec(fill_fec( _ pFEC,pKontoInfo.m_curBO_Wn,strUnit,true) _ ,pKontoInfo.m_curBO_Ma,strUnit,false) _ ,pKontoInfo.m_curObrO_Wn,strUnit,true) _ ,pKontoInfo.m_curObrO_Ma,strUnit,false) _ ,pKontoInfo.m_curObrN_Wn,strUnit,true) _ ,pKontoInfo.m_curObrN_Ma,strUnit,false) _ ,pKontoInfo.m_curSalN_Wn,strUnit,true) _ ,pKontoInfo.m_curSalN_Ma,strUnit,false) _ ,pKontoInfo.m_curSaSN_Wn,strUnit,true) _ ,pKontoInfo.m_curSaSN_Ma,strUnit,false #endif
end function
function zois_tree_extra(byref pFEC,byref pKonto) 'pFEC - first extra cell zois_tree_extra_idkonto pFEC,pKonto.idobj end function
'------------------------------------------------------------ 'firma '------------------------------------------------------------ function prepare_pb_company(byref pTreeHost,byval nRaportType) dim pPB : set pPB = pTreeHost.new_custombuilder()
set prepare_pb_company = pPB end function
function fixeditem_prac_in_jo(byref pTSPD,nParentTypeId, nParentIdObj,byref pFixedCPRD) dim pStatic : set pStatic = pTSPD.prepare_arena(true, FIXED_JO_PRACOW,nParentIdObj,0). _ addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1) pStatic.text = "Pracownicy"
fixeditem_prac_in_jo = true end function
function fixeditem_srtrw_in_jo(byref pTSPD,nParentTypeId, nParentIdObj,byref pFixedCPRD) dim pStatic : set pStatic = pTSPD.prepare_arena(true, FIXED_JO_SRTRW,nParentIdObj,0). _ addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1) pStatic.text = "Środki trwałe"
fixeditem_srtrw_in_jo = true end function
function fixeditem_typrej(byref pTSPD,nParentTypeId, nParentIdObj,byref pFixedCPRD) dim iter : iter = 1 dim strEnum : strEnum = "" do select case iter 'pomijamy dzienniki case N5REJESTRDOK_DZIENNIK_NORM,N5REJESTRDOK_DZIENNIK_BO,N5REJESTRDOK_DZIENNIK_BZ,N5REJESTRDOK_DZIENNIK_BZ_OSTAT 'noop case else strEnum = enum2str(TYPEID_N5REJESTRDOK, ENUMFLDNR_N5REJESTRDOK_ETYP, iter) if strEnum <> "" then dim pStatic : set pStatic = pTSPD.prepare_arena(true, FIXED_TYP_REJ,nParentIdObj,iter).addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1) pStatic.text = strEnum end if end select iter = iter + 1 loop while strEnum <> ""
fixeditem_typrej = true end function
